summary: Ran comprehensive E2E test suite with 24 tests. 21 passed (87.5%), 3 failed. Failures are in size limit validation (422 vs 413), CLI demo args, and API key validation. All major workflows functional. Coverage at 22.26% (below 25% gate, expected issue per project config).
issues: test_upload_size_limit_exceeded: Expected 413, got 422 — status code mismatch in upload endpoint
test_cli_demo_command: SystemExit 2 — CLI argument parsing error in demo mode
test_api_key_not_in_error_logs: Expected 400/500, got 200 — API key validation may not be enforced
Coverage gate failing at 22.26% vs 25% requirement — known issue, pyproject.toml config limitation
